ab: djvadjavay a mapuljat, patagilj anga itjen a kitulu.
ch: 大家好。我們開始上課了。
en: Hello everyone. Let’s start the lesson.

ab: pai gacalji a mapuljat paka kicungali.
djavadjavay sinsi.
qiladju.
djavadjavay a mapuljat, tucu uri temulu ti sinsi ta nakakanen a pinaiwanan.
ch: 大家好。今天老師要教大家食物的東排灣語怎麼說。
en: Hello everyone. Today I am going to teach you how to say food in Paiwanese.

ab: nasepualang anga sun tu anemamaya ti sinsi?
en: A: Do you understand what the teacher says?

ab: sinsi maqati sun a mumalj a puita, ini anan aken nasepualan.
ch: B:老師，我不懂。可以再說一次嗎?
en: B: I don’t understand. Can you repeat it again?

ab: pacunu a pasa maza! kaciuri a kisupu.
ch: 請看這裡! 跟著我唸一遍。
en: Look here, please! Repeat after me.

ab: bulay angata a su kinisupuan.
mumalju anan a puita, sa papezangalu nukisupu sun.
en: Read it again. Please speak louder.

ab: maliceng maya kiljavaran.
alapu a su sapitj.
en: A: Please take out your textbook.

ab: ui sinsi.
sinsi, na maadjuq a ku inpic.
en: B: I forgot to bring my pen.

ab: alapu a su siquliqulip.
en: A: Please take out the eraser.

ab: sinsi na maadjuq a ku siquliqulip.
en: B: I forgot to bring my eraser.

ab: kisedjamu a su salasaladj tua siquliqulip.
ch: A:請跟旁邊同學借橡皮擦。
en: A: Please borrow erasers from your classmates.

ab: maqati sun a pasedjam tjanuaken ta su siquliqulip?
en: B: Can I borrow your eraser?

ab: tjaljumaza anga tja kitulu.
ucevungi anga nu tjaivililj.
ch: 我們就上到這邊，下週再見。
en: Class dismissed, see you next week.
